replies.msg:
1080p is heavily depends on the CPU since there is only so much pixels GPU card needs to create. The 1080p FPS relies on the CPU to do much of the work so the CPU matters a lot.
1440p is more half and half ground for CPU and GPU.
For 4K gaming, it pretty much doesn't matter what the CPU is unless it was released ages ago. GPU determines the FPS.
